title: Intense Briny Vietnamese Fish Pho
description: A light and flavorful one-pot Vietnamese dish featuring sashimi-cut fish, cashew nuts, and a briny broth, kosher-friendly and made with simple ingredients. This recipe is perfect for those looking for a delicious and easy-to-make meal.
instructions: In a large pot, heat the chicken broth over high heat until it reaches a boil.
Add the fish sauce, lime juice, grated ginger, and star anise to the pot and stir to combine.
Reduce the heat to medium-low and simmer the broth for 10 minutes.
Add the fish balls and sashimi-cut fish to the pot and cook for 2-3 minutes, or until the fish is cooked through.
Stir in the chopped cashew nuts and cook for an additional minute.
Add the rice noodles to the pot and cook for 2-3 minutes, or until they are tender.
Season the broth with salt to taste.
Ladle the pho into bowls and garnish with chopped scallions.
